spec_full_name: OWASP Mobile Application Security Verification Standard
verified_against: https://github.com/OWASP/masvs/blob/master/Document/03-Using_the_MASVS.md (lists all 8 control groups including MASVS-PRIVACY) and OWASP MAS blog noting MASVS-PRIVACY was added in v2.1.0 in January 2024
id_format_description: MASVS-<CATEGORY>-<requirement>, e.g. 'MASVS-STORAGE-1'. Category is uppercase ASCII; requirement is a positive integer. The ID format does not embed the spec version; consumers cross-check the spec_version field against the categories present.

STORAGE.title: Storage
STORAGE.description: Secure storage of sensitive data on a device (data-at-rest).

CRYPTO.title: Cryptography
CRYPTO.description: Cryptographic functionality used to protect sensitive data.

AUTH.title: Authentication and Authorization
AUTH.description: Authentication and authorization mechanisms used by the mobile app.

NETWORK.title: Network Communication
NETWORK.description: Secure network communication between the mobile app and remote endpoints (data-in-transit).

PLATFORM.title: Platform Interaction
PLATFORM.description: Secure interaction with the underlying mobile platform and other installed apps.

CODE.title: Code Quality
CODE.description: Security best practices for data processing and keeping the app up-to-date.

RESILIENCE.title: Resilience Against Reverse Engineering and Tampering
RESILIENCE.description: Resilience to reverse engineering and tampering attempts.

PRIVACY.title: Privacy
PRIVACY.description: Privacy controls to protect user privacy.
